pageDescription: Centralized runtime-managed settings for Desktop mods
unifiedDescription: Similar to VSCode extension settings: every mod stores its configuration in a central runtime settings store.
noModsDescription: Install mods from Mod Hub first.
installedDescription: Choose one mod to view/edit its settings
runtimeIssuesDescription: {{failures}} load failures · {{fused}} fused mods. Use the Mods page for full error chains and retry actions.
localChatQuickSettingsDescription: Shortcut toggles for Agent Chat defaults
rawJsonDescription: Edit raw settings JSON for this mod
invalidJson: Settings JSON is invalid. Please provide an object (e.g. {"enabled": true}).
